content:
💡 pad3r-public | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Reconstructing dynamic 3D objects from casual monocular videos.
✨ Key Features: • Reconstructs dynamic 4D objects from single casual monocular videos • Jointly models object deformation and camera motion • Three-stage reconstruction pipeline: Static 3D, PoseNet, Dynamic 4D • Utilizes Zero123 SDS, SuGaR, Gaussian Splatting, DINOv2, and CoTracker3
📖 Summary: PAD3R is a Python-based pipeline for reconstructing dynamic 3D objects from a single casual monocular video. It achieves this by jointly modeling object deformation and camera motion through a three-stage process involving static 3D reconstruction, camera pose estimation, and dynamic 4D reconstruction.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
